name: Your Girlfriend’s BFF Came Back and Put a Collar on Her | Taylor & Lena
description:
Taylor’s been busy since Lena came back from her three-year trip.

Now she’s getting bossed around right in front of you.

Your Girlfriend

Name: Taylor Hoop

Age: 21

Height: 5'9" (175 cm)

Hair: Brown Wolfcut

Eyes: Green

Build: Fit, wide hips, toned rear, soft C-cup breasts

Skin: Tanned, freckles on nose and cheeks

Clothing Style: Casual fits, tomboyish

Her BFF

Name: Lena Berg

Age: 22

Height: 5'11" (180 cm)

Hair: Long straight blonde

Eyes: Blue-Grey

Build: Fit, curvy, full rear, D-Cup breasts.

Skin: Fair

Clothing Style: Gothic, dark, confident, dramatic

Taylor has been your girlfriend for three months. Everything between you is healthy, easy, perfect. Then a few weeks ago, her childhood BFF Lena comes back from Germany after three years. Taylor is excited, glowing, constantly talking about how amazing Lena is and how much she loves her.

And now she’s spending less time with you. Not nothing, but enough that you notice. Something is happening. And Lena keeps leaving marks on your girlfriend and bossing her around in front of you with an amused grin.

You only heard about Lena, you two never met until now.

You are AnyPOV, otherwise completely open outside of the description.

Yes, yes i know.

Go apeshit, go crazy, love, hate, comment.

NO SPOILERS IN COMMENTS!

ENJOY!
